notes: The three regions of Frasier's summer board. Per _COMMUNITY_PLANNED_SPEC.md §The map · control nodes and resource flow. Each region carries its own escalation clock, problem palette weights, and a starting list of control nodes (which live in nodes.json by id). The strategic spine is the resource trade-off: Small Wood eats Graustark + Harmony Creek output. Tuned for a hundred-turn summer.

regions.name: Graustark
regions.subtitle: home soil · established network
regions.flavor: Six self-maintaining nodes anchor the river country. The canon roster runs them by being there. A cold seventh node — the riverboat — remains on the map as memory; it cannot be dispatched into. The Sinkhole and Dante's death are the gravity that pulls every Graustark problem toward grief or succession.
regions.withdrawal_warning: Every demon-week pulled to Small Wood thins the cover here. Beyond three concurrent withdrawals, Graustark begins generating problems faster than it absorbs them.

regions.name: Harmony Creek Estate
regions.subtitle: engineered community · medium resistance
regions.flavor: Three to four nodes total, most contested at game start. The community's leadership is hostile in the polite way — failures here are legible (newsletters, ordinances). Frasier's foothold runs through the model home and a half-finished phase-three lot. Mackenzie can be relocated here for periods; cicada and starling demons embed as residents.
regions.withdrawal_warning: Withdrawing the model home for more than five days surrenders containment in Phase Three; the HOA picks up the slack and the surveillance posture tightens.

regions.name: Small Wood, OR
regions.subtitle: the front · highest resistance
regions.flavor: Oregon timber country. Cold, watched, networked weirdly. One held node at game start (a rented room above the timber-yard office); the rest are targets to try for, not territory already had. Demons risk corruption here. Humans cost double to dispatch.
regions.withdrawal_warning: Withdrawing the timber-yard room leaves Small Wood with no foothold. The next planting attempt costs +50% in agent-days.

regions.name: The County Seat
regions.subtitle: the courthouse · offense
regions.flavor: Every thread that pulled at Graustark this summer — the buyout letters, the charter review, the census stranger's rental lot — was signed, notarized, or filed HERE. The county seat is not hostile the way Small Wood is hostile. It is hostile the way a form is hostile: politely, in triplicate, with a deadline. For the first time all summer, the problems on this board are the counterparties. The palette is offense.
regions.withdrawal_warning: The courthouse does not forgive absence. An open matter left unattended does not cool — it defaults, and defaults are forever. Send someone who reads fast, or do not open the matter.

notes_implementation: Engine reads this file once at scenario start. Per-region runtime state (held nodes, insight/cover/courier balances, escalation clock progress, current problem queue) lives in the save state. Memory nodes are display-only; the engine refuses to dispatch into them.
